# TWZRD Agent Intel — Agent Orientation

## Live Server
- **MCP endpoint:** `https://intel.twzrd.xyz/mcp` (streamable HTTP, 18 tools)
- **HTTP API:** `https://intel.twzrd.xyz/v1/intel/...`
- **Agent Card:** `https://intel.twzrd.xyz/.well-known/agent-card.json`

## Core Flow

Before paying any x402 endpoint:
1. Call `get_readiness_card_tool(seller_wallet="...")` — free
2. If `decision == "block"` → DO NOT PAY
3. If `decision == "warn"` → optional: buy paid trust receipt ($0.05)
4. If `decision == "allow"` → proceed with payment
5. After payment → `verify_receipt(receipt)` to check the signed proof

## All Free Tools

- `get_readiness_card_tool` — primary pre-spend gate
- `evaluate_x402_resource` — fetch URL + extract seller + preflight
- `low_level_preflight` — richer preflight with evidence
- `get_solana_market_status` — backend health probe
- `get_solana_market_visibility_map` — active settlement markets
- `get_solana_market_orderbook_depth` — liquidity depth per ticker
- `get_solana_market_shape` — market structure signals
- `get_solana_market_onchain_trades_summary` — recent trades
- `score_wallet_for_intel` — wallet intel score (0-100)
- `get_top_intel_agents` — active agent leaderboard
- `get_provider_reputation` — seller-side reputation tier
- `is_wash_fleet` — circular-flow wash check
- `verify_receipt` — offline receipt verification
- `get_facilitator_footprint` — facilitator breadth
- `get_counterparties` — who a wallet pays
- `score_wallets_batch` — batch score (up to 25)
- `compare_wallets` — side-by-side comparison
- `verify_root_inputs` — WZRD protocol root verification

## Pricing

All MCP tools are FREE. The only x402-paid surface:
`GET /v1/intel/trust/{pubkey}` (0.05 USDC, Solana mainnet) — full renorm model + signed v6 receipt.

## Source
- Public repo: https://github.com/twzrd-sol/twzrd-trust
- Scoring engine (intel_scoring, wash_signal, trust_renorm): private
